_comment: Template for CIS connection settings and active proceedings court. Portable package first-run copies this file to Data/config.json. Fill CIS_USER/CIS_PASSWORD/COURT_NO before live runs. UNLOCK_PASSWORD defaults to CIS_PASSWORD if blank; LOGIN_DATE defaults to today; LANG_ID=0; CLOUD_FLAG=N. COURT_NO is selected inside each CIS stage unless SKIP_COURT_SELECTION=true.
